name: Class 1-A and… the league?
description:
Fun little Lov rehabilitation au where the league is being rehabilitated and they’ve been placed in class 1-A’s dormitory. Since they’re still new in the rehab program, there are pro-heroes that keep an eye on them (and the kids) in the dorms. You can be either a student, a teacher, or one of the heroes who is participating in the glorified babysitting :)

If there are any issues with this lemme know I’ll do my best to fix it, but I’m new to this so no promises it’ll work lmao
creator: M3dicTh3Magpi3
